subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Almighty, the All-Wise Lord, Who hath distinguished man from all other created beings through the gem of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقتدر مدبریرا لایق و سزاست که انسانرا بگوهر نطق از سائر مخلوقات ممتاز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
